title: [InstCombine] Fold `(select (icmp eq (and x, y), 0), (add/xor x, y), F)`

tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i64 @i64_width_and_eq_0_add_to_or(i64 %x, i64 %y) {
entry:
  %and = and i64 %x, %y
  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %and, 0
  %add = add i64 %x, %y
  %or = or i64 %x, %y
  %cond = select i1 %cmp, i64 %add, i64 %or
  ret i64 %cond
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i64 @i64_width_and_eq_0_add_to_or(i64 %x, i64 %y) {
entry:
  %and = and i64 %x, %y
  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %and, 0
  %or = or i64 %x, %y
  %cond = select i1 %cmp, i64 %or, i64 %or
  ret i64 %cond
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary only demonstrates i32 examples; this tests i64 integer width which is not explicitly covered in the summary or existing tests

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i64 @i64_width_and_eq_0_add_to_or(i64 %x, i64 %y) {
entry:

  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %and, 0
  %add = add i64 %x, %y
  %or = or i64 %x, %y
  %cond = select i1 %cmp, i64 %add, i64 %or
  ret i64 %cond
}

define i64 @i64_width_and_eq_0_add_to_or(i64 %x, i64 %y) {

  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %and, 0

tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i32 @ne_predicate_add_true_arm_transform(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %and = and i32 %x, %y
  %cmp = icmp ne i32 %and, 0
  %or = or i32 %x, %y
  %add = add i32 %x, %y
  %cond = select i1 %cmp, i32 %or, i32 %add
  ret i32 %cond
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i32 @ne_predicate_add_true_arm_transform(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %and = and i32 %x, %y
  %cmp = icmp ne i32 %and, 0
  %or = or i32 %x, %y
  %cond = select i1 %cmp, i32 %or, i32 %or
  ret i32 %cond
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions ne predicate support but existing tests only show non-transforming ne cases; this demonstrates a working ne+add transformation where add is in the false arm

  %or = or i32 %x, %y
  %add = add i32 %x, %y
  %cond = select i1 %cmp, i32 %or, i32 %add
  ret i32 %cond
}

tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define <4 x i32> @vector_i32_and_eq_0_xor_to_or(<4 x i32> %x, <4 x i32> %y) {
entry:
  %and = and <4 x i32> %x, %y
  %cmp = icmp eq <4 x i32> %and, zeroinitializer
  %xor = xor <4 x i32> %x, %y
  %or = or <4 x i32> %x, %y
  %cond = select <4 x i1> %cmp, <4 x i32> %xor, <4 x i32> %or
  ret <4 x i32> %cond
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"
